title: The spinal cord
wikitext:
[]: The spinal cord             Quote Post by terminus » Sun Jan 28, 2007 10:03 pm Well I went and watched Evangelion agian after a year, and I notice there seems to be some a lot of scenes with spinal cords. (ex. when the seele 01 blows up to lcl his spinal cord is left, the eva's with hanging spinal cords) Do you think this is merely concidence or is the director symbolizing something?

[]: Re: The spinal cord             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sun Jan 28, 2007 10:54 pm terminus wrote: Well I went and watched Evangelion agian after a year, and I notice there seems to be some a lot of scenes with spinal cords. (ex. when the seele 01 blows up to lcl his spinal cord is left, the eva's with hanging spinal cords) Do you think this is merely concidence or is the director symbolizing something?

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Sun Jan 28, 2007 11:22 pm o wow where you get that pic? I was refering to the the movie, End of Evangelion where he blew up.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jan 28, 2007 11:30 pm terminus wrote: o wow where you get that pic?
